risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Based on MVR data: 2 drivers with Major Violations status, 1 driver with Accident-only status, majority of drivers (30) showing Minor Violations, and 5 drivers with clear records. Multiple drivers have 2 at-fault accidents on record.

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Fleet consists of 37 vehicles across multiple classes: 12 Extra Heavy Trucks (sleeper/day cab configurations including Freightliner Cascadia, Kenworth T680, Peterbilt 579, Volvo VNL 860, International LT, Mack Anthem), 3 Heavy Trucks (Freightliner M2 112, International MV607, Hino 338), 2 Medium Trucks (Isuzu NPR-HD, Ford E-450), 5 Light Trucks (Ford Transit 350, Ram ProMaster 2500, Ford F-250, Chevrolet Silverado 2500, Ford F-150), 2 Private Passenger vehicles (Toyota Camry, Chevrolet Suburban), and 13 Trailers (Great Dane, Wabash, Utility, Hyundai Translead, Fontaine brands). Driver base of 40 drivers primarily licensed in OH and PA, with some IL and TX licenses.
